name: zsnd_sample_set_destroy_by_name
description: zSndSampleSet_DestroyByName finds a registered sample set by name and tail-dispatches to zSndSampleSet::Destroy.
binary_safe_evidence: VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for @zSndSampleSet_DestroyByName@4 at 0x4a0870 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 12 bytes, the VC object symbol is 16 bytes with 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, and evidence is under build/vc6-verify/zsnd_sample_set_destroy_by_name/verify.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation at 0x4a0870 validates calling zSndSampleSetRegistry::FindByName(setName), moving the result to thiscall ecx, and tail-jumping to zSndSampleSet::Destroy.
The native smoke covers successful named destruction of a loaded set, resourcesLoaded clearing, and missing-name return behavior.
